Comment: sync runtime fixes and deploy election prod

commands: if [ ! -s /opt/election/.env ] && [ -f /opt/election/.env.bak-20260622-093700 ]; then cp /opt/election/.env.bak-20260622-093700 /opt/election/.env; chown ec2-user:ec2-user /opt/election/.env; chmod 600 /opt/election/.env; echo restored_env_from_backup; fi
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet && chmod +x deploy/ec2/deploy.sh && ./deploy/ec2/deploy.sh'
